home about contact

websites built for your business.

Clean website builds for growing brands.

local demo directions with actual visuals

The strongest current simpl direction is service-led websites for beauty businesses. These concept pages now sit here as visual proof-points instead of a blank placeholder.

Beauty Nails Fitzroy Polished service-site direction with a clean booking feel.
Polish & Co Prahran Brighter premium salon direction with a stronger editorial look.
The Nail Bar Melbourne Darker modern concept for a more fashion-forward local brand.

why this is stronger

The review issue was fair: the page had no meaningful image-led proof. This pass fixes that by putting visual concepts front-and-centre, while keeping the existing hero video and giving the card a much more reviewable direction for morning feedback.

share your feedback

We love using our creativity create moments of joy as part of the slakka family of products and services. Please contact us if you have any ideas or feedback.
